instructions: Write your email using all the notes.

task.subject: Planning our video project
task.initialEmail: Hi,||We need to make a short video for our English class next week. [1]Do you think we should make it about healthy food?[/1]||[2]Can we film it at your house on Saturday?[/2] My house is too small and noisy.||[3]Who should act in the video?[/3] We need at least three people.||[4]Should we add music at the end?[/4]||Write back soon||Daniel

sampleAnswer.text: Hi Daniel,||Thanks for your email. [1]I don’t think healthy food is the best topic, but maybe we could make the video about school sports because it would be easier to film.[/1]||[2]I’m sorry, but we can’t film at my house on Saturday because my grandparents are visiting and it will be too busy.[/2]||[3]I think you, me and Sara should act in the video. Sara is confident and she speaks clearly.[/3]||[4]In my opinion, we should add music at the end because it will make the video more interesting.[/4]||See you soon,||Mark
